queries.question: What web framework and content managment system does the author with email 'davidwilson@example.com' use?
queries.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT CMS.Content_Management_System, Web_Framework
FROM Authors AS A
JOIN Articles AS AR ON A.authorID = AR.authorID 
JOIN ContentManagementSystems AS CMS ON AR.articleID = CMS.cmsId
WHERE A.email = 'davidwilson@example.com';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?content_management_system ?web_framework WHERE {
  ?a a :Authors .
  ?ar a :Articles .
  ?ar p:hasAuthors ?a .
  ?cms a :ContentManagementSystems .
  ?ar p:articleID ?articleid_l .
  ?cms p:cmsId ?cmsid_r .
  ?cms p:Content_Management_System ?content_management_system .
  ?cms p:Web_Framework ?web_framework .
  ?a p:email ?email_f .
  FILTER(STR(?articleid_l) = STR(?cmsid_r))
  FILTER(STR(?email_f) = "davidwilson@example.com")
}

queries.question: show me the content management system and web framework that emily brown uses to write her articles
queries.sql:
SELECT CMS.Content_Management_System, Web_Framework
FROM ContentManagementSystems AS CMS
JOIN Articles AS AR ON CMS.cmsId = AR.articleID
JOIN Authors AS A ON AR.authorID = A.authorID
WHERE A.name = 'Emily Brown';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?content_management_system ?web_framework WHERE {
  ?cms a :ContentManagementSystems .
  ?ar a :Articles .
  ?cms p:cmsId ?cmsid_l .
  ?ar p:articleID ?articleid_r .
  ?a a :Authors .
  ?ar p:hasAuthors ?a .
  ?cms p:Content_Management_System ?content_management_system .
  ?cms p:Web_Framework ?web_framework .
  ?a p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?cmsid_l) = STR(?articleid_r))
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Emily Brown")
}

} }

  ?a a :Authors .
  ?ar a :Articles .
  ?ar p:hasAuthors ?a .
  ?cms a :ContentManagementSystems .
  ?ar p:articleID ?articleid_l .
  ?cms p:cmsId ?cmsid_r .
  ?cms p:Content_Management_System ?content_management_system .
  ?a p:email ?email_f .
  FILTER(STR(?articleid_l) = STR(?cmsid_r))

} }
  component_2: { SELECT DISTINCT ?web_framework WHERE {

  ?cms a :ContentManagementSystems .
